description: Style Noteestelle considers desi obsession with bangles and gives the traditional accessory a season lift with their latest bracelet collection. This bracelet strikes the right balance between the ethnic and the edgy. If you're styling your outfit with bangles and bracelets of two tones, this piece is a great add. This bracelet is also a great substitute for noisy glass bangles when you're decked up in an ethnic ensemble!Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsGold clamp bracelet, thick at the centre and thin at the hingeHas a magnetic closureWhite stones at the centre and green and red jewel hues all overMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeBracelet thickness: 1 cm (0.5cm at the hinge)Diameter: 5.5 cm
